base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: This should keep call_wall_acceptance_long active while improving acceptance quality and limiting adaptive target expansion. Promotion requires total net profit within 98% of run_044, trade count within 10%, PnL/exposure flat or better, and preferably lower call-wall average MAE or shorter exposure. Main tradeoff is losing or underpaying the rare $546 convex winner if persistence filtering is too strict.
label: call-wall-persistence-containment
rationale: Use one legal family: batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long. The current leader base is already strong, so the next test should isolate the only profile that owns the portfolio worst MAE while preserving its convex PnL contribution. This avoids global veto tightening, avoids stale/missing 0DTE behavior changes, and avoids repeating the rejected heavy call-volume/net-DEX tightening that cut over $1200 of profit.
